selfEffect.name: Effect: Veil of the Unnamed Vow

description.value:
Frequency once per day

You pull the cloak across yourself and your outline comes apart into a soft blur. You gain the effects of @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.Blur]{Blur} for 1 minute and become @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Concealed]{Concealed}. Using this action applies Effect: Veil of the Unnamed Vow to track the minute; apply the Concealed condition to yourself. As with the spell, your location stays obvious, so you cannot use this concealment to Hide or Sneak.
